overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cozy, high-ceilinged fantasy common room decorated for winter, featuring carved wooden architecture, a large Christmas tree, hanging plants, and a stone fireplace. The camera moves smoothly through the space, revealing students in robes relaxing among leather furniture and bookshelves, before ending at an ornate wooden door. The footage is clearly from a high-quality video game engine with cinematic lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow carved wooden tunnel, moving forward toward a warm light. As the camera exits through a circular archway, it enters a spacious common room revealing a decorated Christmas tree, stone flooring, and wooden balcony levels above.

The Christmas tree shifts to the right side as the camera circles the central space, revealing bookshelves and decorative rugs.

It approaches an ornate circular wooden door with intricate metalwork, ending with a close-up of the carved details and metal handle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined wooden passage into a sprawling, festive common room before narrowing again toward an ornate exit. It begins within a narrow carved tunnel, moving forward through a circular archway to reveal a spacious hall featuring stone flooring and a decorated Christmas tree. As the camera tilts upward to explore the vertical architecture, the view expands to include skylights, hanging plants, and copper pots suspended from beams before panning back down toward the warm glow of a large stone fireplace. The movement then circles through the central seating area, passing students in robes on leather furniture and rows of bookshelves, as the Christmas tree shifts to the periphery. Finally, the scene shifts from the open hall into a narrower side corridor with low ceilings and wall sconces, gliding toward an ornate circular wooden door to end on a close-up of its intricate metalwork.
